contract.name: Clear Pipe Cleanly
contract.description: Run through a clear pipe smoothly by entering at full speed and staying aligned so Mario doesn’t bump or lose momentum. Use it when a transparent pipe bridges a gap or leads past enemies to keep the r

contract.name: Hit Question Blocks
contract.description: Jump underneath question-mark blocks in Super Mario to hit them with Mario’s head and release their item or coins. Use this when a block is directly above Mario or reachable from a nearby platform.

contract.name: Stomp Under Block
contract.description: Jump up from directly beneath a question block or brick to hit it from below, making the block bounce and knocking out or disabling enemies standing on top. Use this when a Goomba or Koopa is walking

contract.name: Move Right Safely
contract.description: Move Mario to the right while staying grounded and avoiding nearby hazards or bad jumps. Use this in the opening stretch or any safe lane to advance toward question blocks, enemies, and the next scree

contract.name: Move Under Block
contract.description: Move Mario so he is directly underneath a question block, lining up his position before jumping to hit it. Use this in the opening area when a nearby block is above Mario and slightly ahead.
